generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor input current I_M for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT time‑series stream of motor shaft angle (r_M) transmitted via MQTT"
]

instance GearboxEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT time‑series stream of gearbox output angle (r_out) transmitted via MQTT"
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "MQTT time‑series stream of motor input current I_M transmitted via MQTT"
]

// C10: Data (measured, derived, simulated)
instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angle trace (r_M) obtained from MotorEncoderStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output angle trace (r_out) obtained from GearboxEncoderStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace (I_M) obtained from MotorCurrentStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque trace derived from measured current and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity trace derived from measured angle data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angle trace generated by SimulinkMotorModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angle trace generated by SimulinkGearboxModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current trace generated by SimulinkMotorModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace generated by SimulinkFrictionModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity trace generated by SimulinkFrictionModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block and internal block diagrams describing the structural composition of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for gearbox friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance ContinuousMultiPhysicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics model updating service integrating measured and simulated data in real time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for transmitting live measurement data from the robot to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeStreamingService
]

instance DataProcessingEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component that consumes measured and simulated data, runs model updates and friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelUpdateService, DataComparisonService, VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard application that visualizes measured vs simulated data and identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance ModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics model updating using measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlImprovementInsight, UpdateControllerAction
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data against measured traces to evaluate model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlImprovementInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of data, model results and identified parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlImprovementInsight
]

instance RealTimeStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Streaming of live sensor data via MQTT to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides StreamingDataInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the gearbox derived from measured and simulated data"
]

instance MotionControlImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion control accuracy achieved by updating control algorithms with identified friction parameters"
]

instance StreamingDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Availability of real‑time sensor data in the digital shadow"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feedback of identified friction parameters to the robot controller to refine motion control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None; the digital shadow is a one‑way passive representation and does not send commands or data back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous data acquisition and processing synchronized with robot operation; the digital shadow updates as new sensor data arrive during runtime."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical robot first axis with sensors → MQTT data streams → processing components (simulation models) → digital shadow data repository (DataTraces, DataPoints) → dashboard visualization; the digital shadow aggregates contextual data traces for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage (runtime) where the digital shadow continuously models the robot's behavior; also used during design for model creation but primary focus is operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each DataTrace to its originating source and processing component; use of both white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven friction models; validation by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑included outputs against measured reference data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted to the digital shadow using the MQTT publish/subscribe protocol over the robot’s network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation references the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as a standard framework for integrating engineering models and metadata with the digital shadow."
]
